Opportunity

Reach people where daily life happens. Across Lagos.

We run campaigns on 100 motorbikes across Lagos, combining LED screens and illuminated panels with route reporting your team can actually use.

The Technology

Smartbox, built for moving campaigns.

Plan a route, schedule creative and follow campaign movement with location reporting from the field.

LIVE ROUTE / LAGOS
01

Geo-Location Triggered Ads

Your ad activates based on exactly where the rider is. The right creative plays in the right neighbourhood, automatically.

02

Dynamic Ad Switching

Content changes by area in real time — Island, Mainland, or wherever your audience is densest.

03

Video Scheduling

Run different creatives in the morning, afternoon, and evening to match your audience's daily rhythm.

04

Real-Time GPS Tracking

See exactly where your campaign is active at any given moment.

05

Campaign Heatmaps

Visualize your highest-impression zones across the city after every campaign.

06

Remote Content Updates

Upload new creatives instantly. No physical changes. No downtime.

The Product

Two ad formats.
One Smartbox.

The LED screen grabs attention. The static panels hold it. Together they give your brand continuous visibility from every angle, on every ride.

1.

LED Digital Screen:

A high-brightness P3 outdoor LED screen plays your ads, animations, and video content as the motorbike moves through your target areas. Up to 6 creative materials rotating every 10 seconds.

2.

Illuminated Static Panels

Two backlit side panels — left and right — keep your brand permanently visible regardless of what's playing on the digital screen. Consistent. Always on.

Book Campaign →

Who we serve

Built for brands that need Lagos attention.

Mass market or niche. Product launch or long-term awareness. If Lagos is your market, this is your medium.

Get Started

Plan a campaign for the routes that matter.

Tell us your audience, schedule and target locations. We will propose a Smartbox run.

Book Campaign →

Our Mission

Push Media turns the streets of Lagos into the most measurable outdoor advertising network in the country. We put your brand on the move — delivering geo-targeted LED impressions where your audience actually lives, works, and travels, and reporting every mile along the way.
